blended.narrative: Grouse Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 4,975 ft. Looking ahead, 50 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 41°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Tuesday: 8" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Wednesday: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 7" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 16" of heavy snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
